title: Mood tracking app
text: Building this app will be a fun way to test a range of your skills. From working with JSON data to logging and charting mood entries, there's a lot to get stuck into!

title: Browser extension manager UI
text: This project will be a fun way to practice working with dynamic data, filtering data, color theming, building a responsive grid, and more!

title: Personal blog
text: This multi-page personal blog project has a JSON file to practice working with dynamic data. You can even use a headless CMS to take the difficulty up a notch!

title: Character counter
text: This project will test a range of your skills, especially your JavaScript, with the counters and letter density graph. The theme switcher is another little challenge.

title: Conference ticket generator
text: In this challenge, you'll create a form that generates a ticket. There's a lot of scope for customizing the generated ticket and putting your own stamp on the project.

title: Personal finance app
text: This app contains 5 pages (Overview, Transactions, Budgets, Pots, and Recurring Bills) and includes a lot of tricky elements. You can also build it as a full-stack app!

title: Tech book club landing page
text: This will be an excellent test of your HTML and CSS skills. The design uses common layout patterns you'll likely use in future projects, as well as some fun details.

title: Dictionary web app
text: In this project, you'll integrate with the Dictionary API to create a real-world dictionary web app. Additional tests include colour themes and font selection.

title: IP Address Tracker
text: In this challenge, you'll be using two separate APIs together to create an IP Address Tracking app.

title: Recipe page
text: This challenge will help you focus on writing semantic HTML. Ensure you think through what HTML elements are most appropriate for each piece of content.

title: Blog preview card
text: This HTML & CSS-only challenge is a perfect project for beginners getting up to speed with HTML and CSS fundamentals, like HTML structure and the box model.

title: Contact form
text: Building accessible forms is a crucial task for front-end developers. This challenge will help you practice building a form with several input types and validation.

title: Body Mass Index calculator
text: This body mass index (BMI) tool will be fun to build, testing your layout, JS and HTML form skills. The responsive layout shifts will also be an interesting challenge!

title: Tic Tac Toe game
text: This classic practice project for web developers is a great exercise to complete. It will test your HTML semantics, your grid layout skill, as well as your JS logic.

title: Product feedback app
text: This will be a perfect portfolio piece! You'll be working with JSON, managing state, and building like a real-world app. You can even create it as a full-stack project!
